text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has been overtaken by exhaustion, so I
take her to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worrying you. Thanks for always looking
out for me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I think I'll just rest my eyes for a while...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why am I on a stage?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And why am I wearing this?
Sniff... Hic...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (Is someone crying?)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (Wait. I'm on a stage, there's an audience before me, and I'm under a spotlight. This can only mean one thing!)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, my beloved pony, why do you cry so?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah, that voice!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I took so long to find you. I've come to
wipe away your tears, my love!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... No need to push. Everyone can get an
autograph.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So, it was just a dream... I had a feeling...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm glad I haven't lost my touch and was able
to ad-lib my lines the second I realized I was on
stage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right. Seems like I'm back at full charge. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right? Why are you crying in a place
like this?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's the wrong line!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What? Then, uh... I-I mean...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... It was just a dream...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I used to get nightmares like that all the time as a
kid, where I blank on my lines in the middle of a
show...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I guess the anxiety is the same, even though I've
traded the stage of the theatre for the turf... Ugh,
I don't feel rested at all...
